title: Saving column templates
excerpt: Back in 2020, someone posted a screenshot (in a now-closed thread) of column setting that allowed you to save the column as a template. This is no longer there :frowning:  Is there a way to save a column as a template no…

posts.author: myrrhw (Myrrh Winston)
posts.cookedHtml: Back in 2020, someone posted a screenshot (in a now-closed thread) of column setting that allowed you to save the column as a template. This is no longer there Is there a way to save a column as a template nowadays? With the Standard plan? Thank you!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: I am affraid the functionality of saving column templates is restricted to the Enterprise plan.

posts.author: myrrhw (Myrrh Winston)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the speedy response!
